item.title: MAS fines local bank S$4 million over anti-money laundering lapses
item.description: The regulator cited weaknesses in transaction monitoring and customer due diligence controls

item.title: Top banking watchdogs issue stark warning over AI-driven cyber attacks
item.description: IT weaknesses could be exploited by frontier models in a 'matter of minutes', say ECB and ESRB

item.title: Top banking watchdogs issue stark warning over AI-driven cyber attacks
item.description: IT weaknesses could be exploited by frontier models in a 'matter of minutes', say ECB and ESRB
